description: A FOIA request seeks the following records: no privacy interest in documents concerning presidential candidate's offer to aid federal government in drug interdiction, a subject about which the candidate had made several public statements.

_provenance.case_name: See Nation Magazine v. U.S. Customs Serv
_provenance.record_description_quote: no privacy interest in documents concerning presidential candidate's offer to aid federal government in drug interdiction, a subject about which the candidate had made several public statements
